product_overview: El Corte is a Spanish-language barber shop web app with a public landing page, customer booking flow, and authenticated admin area. It is also built as an installable PWA with offline support.
core_goals: Browse the barber shop homepage and services
Submit a booking request from the public site
Access protected admin management pages after authentication
Review and manage operational sections for bookings, clients, and working hours
Install and use the app as a PWA with offline fallback

features.name: Public Landing Page
features.description: Shows the barber shop brand, services, booking entry point, and footer links on the home page.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View the hero section and brand presentation -> Scroll through the services section -> Continue to the booking section -> Open footer social links

features.name: Booking Form
features.description: Lets customers enter booking details, check availability, and submit a booking request.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill in name -> Fill in phone number -> Select a date -> Select a time -> Choose a service -> Submit the booking form -> See booking confirmation feedback
Navigate to / -> Leave one or more required booking details empty -> Submit the booking form -> See validation errors for incomplete data
Navigate to / -> Enter an invalid booking value -> Submit the booking form -> See validation feedback for incorrect input

features.name: Admin Authentication and Protection
features.description: Controls access to the admin area and supports signing out from the admin shell.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> See redirect to the admin login or registration access flow when not authenticated
Navigate to /admin/register -> Complete the registration details -> Submit the registration form -> Access the authenticated admin area
Navigate to a protected admin route -> Sign in with valid admin credentials -> Enter the admin shell
Open the admin shell -> Log out -> Return to the unauthenticated state

features.name: Admin Management Pages
features.description: Provides authenticated admin sections for managing bookings, clients, and working hours.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> View the admin dashboard shell -> Open the bookings section -> View bookings management content -> Open the clients section -> View clients management content -> Open the working hours section -> View hours management content
Navigate to /admin -> Open each admin sidebar section one by one -> Observe the active navigation state update as the section changes

features.name: PWA Shell
features.description: Adds installable app support, offline fallback, and browser-based app readiness.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Load the app in a supported browser -> Install the app when prompted by the browser -> Launch the installed app
Navigate to / -> Open the app after assets are cached -> Disconnect from the network -> Open the app offline -> See the offline fallback experience

routes.description: Public landing page with hero, services, booking form, appointments section, and footer

features.name: Public Landing Page
features.description: Displays the barber shop brand, services, booking entry point, and footer links
user_interactions: Scroll through the hero and services sections

features.name: Booking Form
features.description: Collects booking details and validates availability through Supabase before inserting a booking
user_interactions: Fill in name, phone, date, time, and service
See validation errors for incomplete or invalid data
See slot availability states and success or error feedback

features.name: Admin Authentication and Protection
features.description: Protects admin routes and supports logout through the auth context and Supabase session state
user_interactions: Log out from the admin shell

features.name: Admin Management Pages
features.description: Renders the admin dashboard sections for bookings, clients, and working hours
user_interactions: Confirm the active navigation state changes
View the dashboard content in the admin shell

features.name: PWA Shell
features.description: Provides installable app metadata, offline fallback, and service worker support
user_interactions: Load the app in a browser
Open the app offline after assets are cached

known_limitations.issue: Booking submission depends on a backend and Supabase configuration that may not be available in local test runs
known_limitations.impact: Submit flow may fail unless APIs and auth are mocked

known_limitations.issue: Admin routes require authentication state and may redirect during unauthenticated tests
known_limitations.impact: Tests need auth setup or route mocking
